app5_brief_1_body: Packets live in transient memory arrays only. Text is VORTEX-minified and self-destructs on tab close: zero residual footprint.
app5_brief_2_body: Group channels stream through an un-throttled real-time frame (no polling drag). Lookup latency cap: 0.0002 ms. Thermal dissipation: dQ_leak/dt = 0.00 Watts.
app5_brief_3_title: ⌬ 3. X-STYLE PUBLIC BROADCAST STRINGS & THREADS (FEED LAYER)
app5_brief_3_body: Switch to PUBLIC_FEED to emit sovereign thread strings across the Node Mesh. Other nodes can INTERLACE (re-broadcast) or UPVOTE to boost visibility ranking.
app5_brief_4_body: SYNDICATES aggregate strands into structured long-form logs: documentation, community ops, and technical asset records for massive work-unit execution.
